item.title: How much does your period cost?
item.description: Web application that calculates the cost of a year of menstrual cycle: based on quantities of periods, quantity of tampons or pads used per period and brands.

item.title: Topics of National Rock
item.description: Is it possible to identify the stages of argentine rock by the topics its lyrics has along time? In this work we analyzed the relation between lyrics and history by natural language processing techniques.

item.title: COVID Social Representations
item.description: Is it possible to construct relevant information about social representations regarding a specific theme using news reader’s comments?
